Appearances:
Karen W. Yiu, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.5385, for Defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE DEPARTMENT OF REAL ESTATE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
